name: Baked Tuna Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Enriched Corn Meal (Aunt Jemima or Quaker)
1 can Tuna (6-1/2 or 7-oz. size), drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, and salt (if using).
3. Add shortening to the dry ingredients; cut in with your fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Gradually add water, stirring lightly with a fork until a dough forms a ball.
5. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface; knead briefly.
6. Roll the dough into a 12-inch circle and transfer it to a 9-inch glass pie plate.
7. Trim the edges and flute them.
8. Pat broccoli between layers of paper towels, gently pressing to absorb excess moisture.
9. In a separate bowl, mix broccoli, remaining salt, evaporated milk, tuna (flaked), parmesan cheese, and dillweed until combined.
10. Pour this mixture into the pastry shell.
11. Bake for 50-55 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving; serve with lemon wedges if desired.
Note: The nutritional analysis provided is per serving.
